name: 10_system_a_met_five_to_six_still_breaks
description: Branch 3 / System A: condition met with prev vwap_ticks=5 increments to 6, well past threshold, still breaks. Confirms no clamp / no decrement at threshold.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 5.0 >= cross 2.0 AND current_return 2.0 < safe_hwm 5.0 -> MET. new_vwap_ticks = 5 + 1 = 6 (NO clamp at 3). is_vwap_broken = (6 >= 3) = TRUE. System B: current_return 2.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0. Returns (6, 0, True, False). Catches an impl that clamped vwap_ticks at VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS.
